steps.text: Plan and execute UI-safe actions with the current app context.

steps.expression: () => { const newAgentButton = document.querySelector('#home-panel-agents button[data-home-list-new-button="true"]'); if (!(newAgentButton instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { return false; } newAgentButton.click(); return true; }

() => { const bodyText = document.body.textContent ?? ''; const launcher = document.querySelector('button[data-assistant-launcher="true"]'); const bannerText = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('div')).map((node) => node.textContent ?? '').find((text) => text.includes('Agent editor / New Agent')) ?? ''; return launcher instanceof HTMLButtonElement && bannerText.includes('Agent editor / New Agent') && bodyText.includes('Ask the assistant to help with navigation, drafts, or the current council context.') && !bodyText.includes('Open the newest agent.'); }
